steps.title: Focus on surface food
steps.content: The underlined claim says olms regularly surface for important activities such as finding food. Strong support should link their diet to something found at the surface.

steps.title: Rule out unrelated findings
steps.content: A concerns breeding, B concerns habitat range, and D concerns brain anatomy; none shows surface feeding. A major diet of earthworms from surface soils would show olms leave caves to find food. The answer is C.
